page_content:
Formerly: IDEA379A.

IDEA345 Becoming a Design Thinker (1 Credit)

Learn design thinking tools and mindsets to create change in meaningful ways and cultivate your curiosity in this dynamic, hands-on course. Encounter new approaches to learning from others, synthesizing qualitative data, visualizing your ideas, and navigating ambiguity

(among others!) while applying the tools and techniques to real-world applications. No prior experience or knowledge of design thinking is needed.
